name: Healthcare Triangle, Inc.
summary: PART I We are a Healthcare information technology company focused on advancing innovative industry-transforming solutions in the sectors of cloud services, data science, and professional and managed services for the Electronic Health Record (EHR), Healthcare and Life Sciences industry. Our approach leverages our proprietary technology platforms, extensive industry knowledge, and healthcare domain expertise to provide solutions and services that reinforce healthcare progress.
